summary: Amantadine ER was not officially designated as the first-approved treatment for akinesia, despite its historical use in Parkinson’s disease for symptomatic relief. The lack of evidentiary support for this claim—and the well-established role of levodopa—as confirmed by medical literature makes "yes" unsupported.

The lack of evidentiary support for this claim—and the well-established role of levodopa—as confirmed by medical literature makes "yes" unsupported.. Answer choice: B
